entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, including genotypes CO 24, CO 25, CO 26 and JH 35

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: External factors affecting seed development and maturation

entities.name: SEED DEVELOPMENT AND MATURATION
entities.description: The biological process of seed growth and ripening

entities.name: SEED QUALITY
entities.description: The physiological characteristics and overall health of seeds

entities.name: MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water present in the seed

entities.name: SEED LENGTH AND WIDTH
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the seed

entities.name: SEED DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the seed after water removal

entities.name: WATER ABSORPTION
entities.description: The percentage of water absorbed by the seed

entities.name: GERMINATION POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of seeds to germinate under specific conditions

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the root system in the seedling

entities.name: SHOOT LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the shoot system in the seedling

entities.name: SEEDLING DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the seedling after water removal

entities.name: FIELD EMERGENCE
entities.description: The ability of seeds to emerge from the soil in the field

entities.name: SEED RECOVERY
entities.description: The amount of seed recovered after processing

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total quantity of seed produced

entities.name: VIGOUR INDEX
entities.description: A calculated index representing seed vigour

entities.name: SEED VIGOUR
entities.description: The strength, health, and performance of the seed

entities.name: STRESS TESTS
entities.description: Tests used to evaluate seed vigour under adverse conditions

entities.name: AMMONIUM CHLORIDE SOAKING
entities.description: A stress test involving soaking seeds in ammonium chloride

entities.name: D-MANITOL SOAKING
entities.description: A stress test involving soaking seeds in D-manitol

entities.name: ACCELERATED AGEING
entities.description: A method to simulate ageing to test seed vigour

entities.name: EXHAUSTION TESTS
entities.description: Tests designed to exhaust seed reserves to evaluate vigour

entities.name: GERMINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a seed to germinate

entities.name: VIABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a seed to remain alive and capable of germination

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL MATURITY
entities.description: The stage of seed development where dry weight and vigour are maximized

entities.name: HARVESTABLE MATURITY
entities.description: The stage of seed development when seeds are ready for harvest
